inherited_constraints_block_C6: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades>=100 total; OOS>=50/y; no relaxation. Pre-SEAL K9 turnover MEASURED (signal-only, no P&L, fresh 48-name universe) PASSES: IS aggregate 310; OOS 171 (85.8/y) CLEARS the floor; per-fold F1-F5 97/87/83/100/112 (agg 479).

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-ref 52a3b60): >=3/5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds positive + aggregate net>0 + K9; P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Folds LOCKED at DA22.

FRESH s21 CANDIDATE (NOT a tune/_revN_ of s18/s19/s20): mechanic byte-identical to the s18/s19/s20 weekly spec; the ONLY change is the universe (fresh 48-name, zero overlap with s17/s18/s19). s18 (7e6aa36) / s19 (a3aed99) / s20 (e9ec72f) frozen/untouched. M=8 unchanged.

EDGE NOT INHERITED: the fresh-basket edge MUST be re-proven from scratch at s21 P6 IS (K1 sharpe>0 AND K2 expectancy>0), P6.7 K13, and P10 OOS. A null/negative result = accepted, informative (the weekly RS edge is partly universe-specific).

CLEAN-GENERALIZATION (BINDING; resolves the s20 selection caveat): the s21 basket has 0/48 names ever backtested under this mechanic -> a positive s21 IS/OOS is GENUINE independent generalization evidence (no selection bias, unlike s20's union which included the known-OOS-good s18 basket). Honest residual: names pre-committed in the RUN_BOOK (dd69414) by liquidity/sector-spread/listing-history, NEVER by performance; no look-ahead.

PURPOSE = CLEAN GENERALIZATION: the breadth-solves-OOS-K9 mechanism was proven in s20 (LESSON_S20_D1_001) and pre-SEAL MEASURED to GENERALIZE here (OOS 171/85.8y on fresh names, even higher than s20's 67.2/y). The open binding question is whether the EDGE (P&L) survives on fresh names -- tested at P6 IS / P6.7 / P10.
RELATIVE-STRENGTH-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): weekly cadence; 126-21 ranking signal; top-8 equal-weight; relative-rank exit (no trailing/ATR stop). Identical to s18/s19/s20.
Params L=126 / S=21 / M=8 / R=5(weekly) LOCKED byte-equivalent (identical to s18/s19/s20; NOT tuned, NOT searched). M held at 8 -> breadth from universe size alone.
DA3 equal-weight 1/M; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).

DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-ref 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal. Cost_drag projected ~1-3% (s20 measured 1.03% at this breadth); turnover branch true; DR10-v2 binding at P6.5; expected clear with narrower-but-adequate margin.
split_only CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse the DR9-passed FRESH CSVs (d76c999); switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN; AVGO 10:1 (2024-07-15) + all Tiingo splitFactors applied+verified; dividends not adjusted.
FRESH 48-name universe LOCKED (zero overlap with s17/s18/s19); widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).

DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 48 by sealed result d76c999 (result_seal 9835c0d2a21f40eb); calendar-aligned 1759 bars; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent; sha-verified all 48 at the DRAFT measurement.
A7 + K10 + K6 LOAD-BEARING (top-8 of 48 -> broad sector spread); NOT the risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).

no_strategy_optimization_authorized: byte-locked s18/s19/s20 params, NOT grid-searched/tuned; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched; no cadence-tuning; no held-N change; no universe performance-selection.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.
